text.title: MCP Client Integration — Agents, Claude Code, Host Configuration — Decision Tree

branch.conclusion: Use host config file (claude-desktop-config.json). Maintain allow-list.

branch.question: Is the tool catalogue static at startup or dynamic?

branch.conclusion: Bridge at startup: list_tools once, freeze schema, expose as SDK tools.
Bridge per-session: re-list on session start, freeze for session; reject mid-session deltas.

example.p: Custom Claude SDK agent + filesystem + github servers → claude_sdk_custom → static catalogue → freeze schema at startup, audit each call.
